rulings.Case Title: MELINDA B. CORTEZ et al VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 27, 2012 Line 1 - DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continue to July 17, 2012, moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C by June 27, 2012 4:00PM. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. ASSET FORECLOSURE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 27, 2012 Line 2 - Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order. Deny - moving party failed to sustain burden didn't show Escrow balance i.e. that she was in fact charged/billed anything in excess of the amount owed on the original Escrow And authorized late fees. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN LACAP VS. GLENDA VARGAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 27, 2012 Line 3 - DEFENDANT GLENDA VARGAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain, with leave to amend to allege in good faith compliance with or exemption to San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(c). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRUE COMPASS, LLC VS. OSCAR ROSALES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 27, 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT OSCAR ROSALES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises issue of fact. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH A. WILSON VS. JAVIER H. HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 27, 2012 Line 5 - DEFENDANT IVAN HERNANDEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer assertions in complaint deemed true therefore improperly raises fact. =(501/REQ)
